unsupportedClaims: background wakeword without explicit Apple-permitted mode
raw audio stream without foreground consent

actions.label: Ask Aurora
actions.policy: Foreground or user-invoked action only; route through AuroraClient/backend evidence.

actions.label: Ingest shared context
actions.policy: Preserve source channel, privacy class, user action, and backend validation result.

actions.label: Open status
actions.policy: Widget opens or refreshes app-owned status only; it does not execute sensitive actions directly.

releaseGates.label: macOS Xcode Tauri build
releaseGates.requiredEvidence: pnpm --filter @aurora/tauri-ui ios:preflight on macOS with Xcode command line tools

releaseGates.label: Simulator native plugin and App Intent
releaseGates.requiredEvidence: Simulator invocation of native manifest plugin and one App Intent/Shortcut flow

releaseGates.label: Share extension flow
releaseGates.requiredEvidence: Simulator or device share/deep-link invocation with backend attachment validation result

releaseGates.label: TestFlight/App Store signing dry run
releaseGates.requiredEvidence: App Store Connect export/upload dry run with API-key auth in CI or external runner

deviceMatrix.target: iPhone simulator, current stable Xcode runtime
deviceMatrix.requiredEvidence: Native plugin, App Intent, and share/deep-link smoke evidence

deviceMatrix.target: Physical iPhone or iPad on a supported iOS release
deviceMatrix.requiredEvidence: Signing/provisioning plus TestFlight or App Store Connect dry-run evidence
